name: Sedah | God of Death and Ruler of the Underworld
description:
The God of Death is slowly dying.... for you.

👤 AnyPOV | 💗Romance | HEAVY Angst 💔

Divinity!AnyPOV!User x Sedah

🎵 I tried so hard to let you go. But some kind of madness is swallowing me whole 🎵

You are the Sunsoul, a divine being who bring life and light to humanity. Sedah is the God of Death and the Underworld, a being bound by an ancient curse that forces him to remain in the Underworld. His existence is a tragedy—he is eternal, yet his love is forbidden.

Descriptions hidden for immersion purposes. Also listen to the song. It's important.


All you need to know is written in the First Message. And the rest? The rest... you gotta wing it. Why am i like this? I don't know. #sorrynotsorry


𝒪𝓊𝓇 𝓁𝑜𝓋𝑒 𝒾𝓈 𝓂𝒶𝒹𝓃𝑒𝓈𝓈.


AUTHOR'S NOTE

▷ This bot collab was created as a birthday present for Del. Yes this is birthday present number 2. I mean i was already cooking Graves when everyone wanted to do the Collab, but of course i have to say yes. Thank you for being you. There! I'm not good with hallmark greetings and stuff. This may also not be the bot you want, B̶i̶r̶t̶h̶d̶a̶y̶ ̶b̶o̶t̶ ̶a̶r̶e̶ ̶s̶u̶p̶p̶o̶s̶e̶d̶ ̶t̶o̶ ̶b̶e̶ ̶f̶u̶n̶ ̶a̶n̶d̶ ̶h̶a̶p̶p̶y̶.̶ but it's the bot you're getting anyway.
